preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City contra Seattle Sounders: Thomas cauteloso ante la amenaza de Joveljic
preReview.description: Los Seattle Sounders estarán atentos a Dejan Joveljic cuando se enfrenten a Sporting Kansas City en la MLS este fin de semana.

preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City v Seattle Sounders: Thomas attento alla minaccia di Joveljic
preReview.description: I Seattle Sounders terranno d'occhio Dejan Joveljic quando affronteranno lo Sporting Kansas City in MLS questo weekend.

preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City x Seattle Sounders: Thomas atento à ameaça de Joveljic
preReview.description: O Seattle Sounders estará de olho em Dejan Joveljic quando enfrentar o Sporting Kansas City na MLS neste fim de semana.

preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City v Seattle Sounders: Thomas wary of Joveljic threat
preReview.description: The Seattle Sounders will be keeping a close eye on Dejan Joveljic when they face Sporting Kansas City in the MLS this weekend.

preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City v Seattle Sounders : Thomas se méfie de la menace Joveljic
preReview.description: Les Seattle Sounders garderont un œil attentif sur Dejan Joveljic lorsqu'ils affronteront le Sporting Kansas City en MLS ce week-end.

preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City gegen Seattle Sounders: Thomas gewarnt vor Joveljic-Bedrohung
preReview.description: Die Seattle Sounders werden Dejan Joveljic genau im Auge behalten, wenn sie an diesem Wochenende in der MLS auf Sporting Kansas City treffen.

preReview.title: سبورتنج كانساس سيتي ضد سياتل ساوندرز: توماس يحذر من تهديد جوفيليتش
preReview.description: سيقوم سياتل ساوندرز بمتابعة ديجان جوفيليتش عن كثب عندما يواجهون سبورتنج كانساس سيتي في الدوري الأمريكي لكرة القدم هذا الأسبوع.

preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City x Seattle Sounders: Thomas atento à ameaça de Joveljic
preReview.description: O Seattle Sounders ficará de olho em Dejan Joveljic quando enfrentarem o Sporting Kansas City na MLS neste fim de semana.

QAData.question: Who won between Sporting Kansas City and Seattle Sounders FC on Sun, 13 Jul 2025 00:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Seattle Sounders FC won 3–2 over Sporting Kansas City on Sun, 13 Jul 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
